title: Animal Pens Expansion - Alex's Mobs
description: This is addon for Animal Pens that enables Alex's Mobs.
body:
# Animal Pens Expansion – Alex's Mobs

This mod is a compatibility addon that allows mobs from Alex's Mobs to work with the pens from Animal Pens, making animal management easier and more consistent.

The mod is mostly server-side - datapack + `shearing` snapping turtle and bison. Client-side only adds `animations` for animals in the Aquarium and Aviary.

## Features

_Animal Cage pickable_:
- Alligator Snapping Turtle - can be fed cod, and sheared
- Anaconda - can be fed chicken, and it sheds its skin
- Anteater - can be fed leafcutter and pupa
- Bison - can be fed wheat, and sheared
- Capuchin Monkey - can be fed insect items
- Cockroach - can be fed sugar, and can drop eggs using bucket
- Elephant - can be fed acacia blossom
- Emu - can be fed apple, grass or leaves, and can drop eggs using bucket
- Endergrade - can be fed chorus fruit
- Enderiophage - can be fed wheat
- Flutter - can be fed bone meal
- Froststalker - can be fed porkchop
- Gazelle - can be fed wheat or acacia blossom
- Gelada Monkey - can be fed dead bush
- Gorilla - can be fed bananas
- Grizzly Bear - can be fed salmon
- Jerboa - can be fed insect items
- Kangaroo - can be fed dead bush or grass
- Komodo Dragon - can be fed rotten flesh
- Laviathan - can be fed mosquito larva
- Leafcutter Ant - can be fed gongylidia
- Maned Wolf - can be fed apple, rabbit or chicken
- Moose - can be fed dandelion, and periodically drops antlers
- Mungus - can be fed mungal spores, and can drop spores using bucket
- Platypus - can be fed lobster tail, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Raccoon - can be fed raccoon foodstuffs
- Rattlesnake - can be fed meat or fish
- Roadrunner - can be fed insect items, and sheared for feathers
- Sea Bear - can be fed fishes
- Seal - can be fed fishes
- Shoebill -
- Snow Leopard - can be fed moose ribs
- Spectre - can be fed soul heart
- Stradpole - can be fed mosquito larva, and can be picked up with lava bucket
- Tarantula Hawk - can be fed fermented spider eye
- Tasmanian Devil - can be fed meat
- Tiger - can be fed tiger breedables
- Tusklin - can be fed red mushroom
- Warped Toad - can be fed mosquito larva
- Rain Frog (1.19+) - can be fed insect items
- Rhinoceros (1.19+) - can be fed insect items
- Sugar Glider (1.19+) - can be fed honeycomb
- Potoo (1.19+) - can be fed dead bush or grass
- Mudskipper (1.19+) - can be fed insect items and lobster tail, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Skunk (1.19.2+) - can be fed sweet berries
- Banana Slug (1.19.2+) - can be fed brown mushroom, and periodically drops slime slug
- Caiman (1.19.3+) - can be fed catfish, and can drop caiman eggs using bucket


_Avian Net pickable_:
- Bald Eagle - can be fed rotten flesh
- Cosmaw - can be fed with cosmic cod
- Crow - can be fed pumpkin seeds
- Cosmic Cod - can be fed seagrass or kelp, and can be picked up with bucket
- Fly - can be fed rotten flesh
- Hummingbird - can be fed flowers
- Seagull - can be fed cod
- Spectre - can be fed soul heart
- Sunbird -
- Toucan - can be fed egg
- Blue Jay (1.19.2+) - can be fed blue jay foodstuffs


_Aquatic Jar pickable_:
- Alligator Snapping Turtle - can be fed cod, and sheared
- Anaconda - can be fed chicken, and it sheds its skin
- Blobfish - can be picked up with water bucket
- Cachalot Whale - can be fed fishes
- Catfish - can be fed sea pickle, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Comb Jelly - can be picked up with water bucket
- Crocodile - can be fed rotten flesh, and can drop eggs using bucket
- Devils Hole Pupfish - can be fed moss, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Flying Fish - can be fed seagrass or kelp, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Frilled Shark - can be fed fishes, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Giant Squid - can be fed fishes
- Hammerhead Shark - can be fed fishes
- Lobster - can be fed fishes, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Mantis Shrimp - can be fed lobster tail
- Mimic Octopus - can be fed tropical fish, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Orca - can be fed salmon
- Platypus - can be fed lobster tail, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Seal - can be fed fishes
- Terrapin - can be fed seagrass, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Mudskipper (1.19+) - can be fed insect items and lobster tail, and can be picked up with water bucket
- Caiman (1.19.3+) - can be fed catfish, and can drop caiman eggs using bucket
- Triops (1.19.3+) - can be fed carrots and larva, and can drop triop eggs using bucket


## 🛠️ Requirements:

📌 **[Animal Pen](https://modrinth.com/mod/animalpens/)** (Required).  
📖 **[Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs/)** (Required).
